About Organization

The BPSSC is a government organization responsible for recruiting candidates for various government jobs in the state of Bihar.

The organization aims to provide employment opportunities to eligible candidates and contribute to the development of the state.

About the Programme

The Forest Range Officer Recruitment programme is a government job opportunity for eligible candidates to work in the forest department of the Bihar government.

The programme aims to recruit candidates who are passionate about working in the forest sector and contributing to the conservation and management of forests.
